files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Actions.EncoderBase
files.Summary: Main abstract class your plugin should derive from for dials (not keys). For keys use KeypadBase or KeyAndEncoderBase.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Actions.IApplicationMonitorPlugin
files.Summary: Optional interface for plugin actions that need to monitor application launch/terminate events. Implement this on your plugin action class to receive these global events.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Actions.ICommonPluginFunctions
files.Summary: Common functions used by both keypad and dial plugins

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Actions.IDeviceMonitorPlugin
files.Summary: Optional interface for plugin actions that need to respond to Stream Deck device connect/disconnect events. Implement this on your plugin action class to receive these global events.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Actions.IEncoderPlugin
files.Summary: Interface used to capture dial/encoder events

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Actions.IKeypadPlugin
files.Summary: Interface used to capture key events

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Actions.ISystemLifecyclePlugin
files.Summary: Optional interface for plugin actions that need to respond to system wake events. Implement this on your plugin action class to receive these global events.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Actions.KeyAndEncoderBase
files.Summary: Main abstract class your plugin should derive from for actions that support both keys and dials. For keys only use KeypadBase. For dials only use EncoderBase.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Actions.KeypadBase
files.Summary: Main abstract class your plugin should derive from for keys (not dials). For dials use EncoderBase or KeyAndEncoderBase.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Attributes.FilenamePropertyAttribute
files.Summary: FilenamePropertyAttribute - Used to indicate the current property holds a file name. This will allow StreamDeck Utilities to strip the mandatory "C:\fakepath" added by the SDK

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Attributes.SdSettingsAttribute
files.Summary: Marks a settings class for AOT-compatible source-generated JSON population. The class must also be declared as partial for the source generator to implement it .

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Attributes.SdpiOutputDirectoryAttribute
files.Summary: SdpiOutputDirectoryAttribute - Specifies the output directory for the generated SDPI HTML file. The HTML filename will be the name of the decorated class with a .html extension. Defaults to PropertyInspector/

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Attributes.SdpiPropertyNameAttribute
files.Summary: SdpiPropertyNameAttribute - Specifies the name of an SDPI property on a class property.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Attributes.SoftwareMinVersion
files.Summary: Minimum Stream Deck software version required by the plugin.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Attributes.StreamDeckActionAttribute
files.Summary: Configures action-level manifest properties for a plugin action class. Controllers (Keypad, Encoder) are derived automatically from the implemented interfaces and do not need to be specified here.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Attributes.StreamDeckPluginAttribute
files.Summary: Configures plugin-level manifest properties. Values set here override MSBuild properties but are overridden by . Apply to the assembly ([assembly: StreamDeckPlugin(...)]) or to any class in the project.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.BuildTasks.ExtractSdpiHtml
files.Summary: Extracts HTML content from a source-generated C# file containing SDPI HTML constants. Supports multiple HTML outputs from classes decorated with SdpiOutputDirectoryAttribute.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.BuildTasks.GenerateRuntimeWrapper
files.Summary: Generates a shell script wrapper that sets DOTNET_ROOT before launching the plugin binary. This is needed when .NET is installed at a non-standard path (e.g. via mise) because macOS GUI apps like Stream Deck do not inherit shell environment variables.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Events.BaseEvent
files.Summary: Base event that all the actual events derive from

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Events.Dtos.ApplicationDidLaunchEvent
files.Summary: Payload for ApplicationDidLaunch event

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Events.Dtos.ApplicationDidTerminateEvent
files.Summary: Payload for ApplicationDidTerminate Event

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Events.Dtos.DeviceDidConnectEvent
files.Summary: Payload for DeviceDidConnect Event

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Events.Dtos.DeviceDidDisconnectEvent
files.Summary: Payload for DeviceDidDisconnect Event

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Events.Dtos.DialDownEvent
files.Summary: Payload for Dial down event

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Events.Dtos.DialRotateEvent
files.Summary: Payload for dial rotation event

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Events.Dtos.DialUpEvent
files.Summary: Payload for Dial up event

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Events.Dtos.DidReceiveGlobalSettingsEvent
files.Summary: Payload for DidReceiveGlobalSettings Event

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Events.Dtos.DidReceiveSettingsEvent
files.Summary: Payload for DidReceiveSettings Event

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Events.Dtos.KeyDownEvent
files.Summary: Payload for KeyDown event

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Events.Dtos.KeyUpEvent
files.Summary: Payload for KeyUp event

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Events.Dtos.PropertyInspectorDidAppearEvent
files.Summary: Payload for PropertyInspectorDidAppearEvent event

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Events.Dtos.PropertyInspectorDidDisappearEvent
files.Summary: Payload for PropertyInspectorDidDisappearEvent event

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Events.Dtos.SendToPluginEvent
files.Summary: Payload for SendToPluginEvent event

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Events.Dtos.SystemDidWakeUpEvent
files.Summary: Payload for SystemDidWakeUp event

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Events.Dtos.TitleParametersDidChangeEvent
files.Summary: Payload for TitleParametersDidChangeEvent event

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Events.Dtos.TouchTapEvent
files.Summary: Payload for touchpad press

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Events.Dtos.WillAppearEvent
files.Summary: Payload for WillAppearEvent event

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Events.Dtos.WillDisappearEvent
files.Summary: Payload for WillDisappearEvent event

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Payloads.AppearancePayload
files.Summary: Payload for Appearance settings

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Payloads.ApplicationPayload
files.Summary: ApplicationPayload

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Payloads.DialPayload
files.Summary: Payload received when a dial is down or up

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Payloads.DialRotatePayload
files.Summary: Payload received when a dial is rotated

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Payloads.EmptyPayload
files.Summary: Empty payload in event

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Payloads.InitialPayload
files.Summary: Payload received during the plugin's constructor

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Payloads.KeyCoordinates
files.Summary: Coordinates of the current key

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Payloads.KeyPayload
files.Summary: Payload received when a key is pressed or released

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Payloads.ReceivedGlobalSettingsPayload
files.Summary: Payload that holds all the settings in the ReceivedGlobalSettings event

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Payloads.ReceivedSettingsPayload
files.Summary: Payload that holds all the settings in the ReceivedSettings event

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Payloads.TitleParametersPayload
files.Summary: Payload for TitleParametersDidChange Event

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Payloads.TitleParametersRawPayload
files.Summary: Raw payload for TitleParametersRawPayload event (without objects)

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Payloads.TouchpadPressPayload
files.Summary: Payload received when the touchpad (above the dials) is pressed

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Registration.DeviceType
files.Summary: Type of StreamDeck hardware device, currently two are supported (classic and mini)

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Registration.RegistrationInfo
files.Summary: Class which holds information on the StreamDeck app and StreamDeck hardware device that the plugin is communicating with

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Registration.StreamDeckApplicationInfo
files.Summary: Holds general information on the StreamDeck App we're communicating with

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Registration.StreamDeckDeviceInfo
files.Summary: Class which holds information on the StreamDeck hardware device

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Registration.StreamDeckDeviceSize
files.Summary: Layout of the keys on the StreamDeck hardware device

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Registration.StreamDeckOptions
files.Summary: Class holding all the information passed to the plugin when the program was launched

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.Registration.StreamDeckPluginInfo
files.Summary: Holds general information on the StreamDeck App we're communicating with

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.SdWebSocketClient
files.Summary: Underlying object that communicates with the stream deck app

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Communication.SdkTarget
files.Summary: Target to send Title/Image to

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Components.BaseComponent
files.Summary: Base class for all SDPI Property Inspector components. Provides the common properties shared by every component: label, setting key, current value, default value, and disabled state.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Components.Button
files.Summary: The <sdpi-button> component rendering of localized content.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Components.Calendar.BaseCalendar
files.Summary: The common properties for all calendar input types.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Components.Calendar.Date
files.Summary: The <sdpi-calendar type="date"> component provides a styled wrapper of <input type="date">.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Components.Calendar.DateTime
files.Summary: The <sdpi-calendar type="datetime-local"> component provides a styled wrapper of <input type="datetime-local">.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Components.Calendar.Month
files.Summary: The <sdpi-calendar type="month"> component provides a styled wrapper of <input type="month">.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Components.Calendar.Time
files.Summary: The <sdpi-calendar type="time"> component provides a styled wrapper of <input type="time">.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Components.Calendar.TimeTypes
files.Summary: Contains all the valid values for the "type" attribute of <sdpi-calendar> components.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Components.Calendar.Week
files.Summary: The <sdpi-calendar type="week"> component provides a styled wrapper of <input type="week">.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Components.Checkbox
files.Summary: The <sdpi-checkbox> component provides a styled wrapper of <input type="checkbox">.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Components.CheckboxList
files.Summary: The <sdpi-checkbox-list> component provides a way of rendering multiple <sdpi-checkbox> components that represent a single value within the settings.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Components.Color
files.Summary: The <sdpi-color> component provides a styled wrapper of <input type="color">.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Components.Delegate
files.Summary: The <sdpi-delegate> component enables the invocation of a sendToPlugin event, allowing for the persisted setting to be delegated to the plugin, and then rendered within this component.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Components.File
files.Summary: The <sdpi-file> component provides a styled wrapper of <input type="file">.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Components.GroupEnd
files.Summary: Closes a collapsible group opened by a field.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Components.GroupStart
files.Summary: Opens a collapsible group in the Property Inspector. Place this before the components you want to group, and close it with a field.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Components.LocalizedContent
files.Summary: The <sdpi-i18n> component provides rendering of localized content.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Components.Password
files.Summary: The <sdpi-password> component provides a styled wrapper of <input type="password">.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Components.Radio
files.Summary: The <sdpi-radio> component provides a styled wrapper of <input type="radio">.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Components.Range
files.Summary: The <sdpi-range> component provides a styled wrapper of <input type="range">.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Components.Select
files.Summary: The <sdpi-select> component provides a styled wrapper of <input type="select">.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Components.Settings.DataSourceSettings
files.Summary: Allows the possible values of a setting to be populated from an external data source. See the SDPI component docs.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Components.Settings.OptionSetting
files.Summary: Represents a single selectable option in a , , or component. Rendered as an <option> element in the generated HTML.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Components.Settings.PersistenceSettings
files.Summary: Controls how and where a component's value is persisted in the Stream Deck settings. When is empty the parent component's Setting key is used.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Components.TextArea
files.Summary: The <sdpi-textarea> component provides a styled wrapper of <textarea>.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Components.Textfield
files.Summary: The <sdpi-text> component provides a styled wrapper of <input type="text">.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.ISettingsPopulatable
files.Summary: Implemented by settings classes that support AOT-compatible JSON merge/patch population. Apply to a partial settings class and the source generator will implement this interface automatically.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Manifest.ManifestAction
files.Summary: Represents a single action entry within a Stream Deck plugin manifest. Populated automatically by the manifest source generator from [StreamDeckAction] attributes.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Manifest.ManifestApplicationsToMonitor
files.Summary: Specifies the applications whose launch and termination events the plugin wants to receive. Supply an instance via .

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Manifest.ManifestConfigBase
files.Summary: Base class for providing manifest configuration that cannot be derived from code or MSBuild properties. Subclass this in your plugin project to supply default states, encoder configuration, application monitoring, and profile settings. Values from this class take highest priority — they override both [StreamDeckPlugin]/[StreamDeckAction] attributes and MSBuild properties.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Manifest.ManifestEncoderConfig
files.Summary: Configures the Stream Deck+ encoder (dial) appearance for an action. Set via or per-action in the manifest.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Manifest.ManifestOS
files.Summary: Specifies a supported OS platform and its minimum required version.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Manifest.ManifestProfile
files.Summary: Describes a Stream Deck profile bundled with the plugin. Supply instances via .

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Manifest.ManifestRoot
files.Summary: Represents the root structure of a Stream Deck plugin manifest (manifest.json). Populated by the manifest source generator at build time; use and the [StreamDeckPlugin]/[StreamDeckAction] attributes to control the output.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Manifest.ManifestSoftware
files.Summary: Specifies the minimum required Stream Deck software version.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Manifest.ManifestStateConfig
files.Summary: Configures the appearance of a single action state in the Stream Deck manifest. A state controls the image, title, and font displayed on the key for that state.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Manifest.ManifestTriggerDescription
files.Summary: Human-readable descriptions of the dial's trigger interactions shown in the Stream Deck UI. All fields are optional and omitted when null.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Runtime.ClientWebSocketWrapper
files.Summary: Default implementation backed by .

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Runtime.IClientWebSocket
files.Summary: Abstraction over to enable testing and injection.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Runtime.IOutboundConnection
files.Summary: Interface for a Stream Deck connection. Provides outbound API methods to send commands to the Stream Deck app. Incoming events are delivered via interface methods on ICommonPluginFunctions and its extensions.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Runtime.IPluginActionRegistry
files.Summary: This class is intended to be implemented by a class generated in Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.SourceGenerators

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Runtime.OutboundConnection
files.Summary: Outbound API client for a single Stream Deck action instance. Use this to send commands (set title, set image, etc.) to the Stream Deck app. Incoming events are delivered via interface methods on ICommonPluginFunctions.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Runtime.Toolkit
files.Summary: Main entry point for the Stream Deck plugin toolkit. Call from your plugin's Main method to connect to the Stream Deck app.

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Utilities.ExtensionMethods
files.Summary: Extension methods for various objects

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Utilities.GlobalSettingsManager
files.Summary: Helper class which allows fetching the GlobalSettings of a plugin

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Utilities.GraphicsTools
files.Summary: Library of tools used to manipulate graphics

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Utilities.IUpdateHandler
files.Summary: Interface for a plugin update handler

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Utilities.Logger
files.Summary: Logger helper class

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Utilities.PluginUpdateInfo
files.Summary: Response to an update request

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Utilities.PluginUpdateStatus
files.Summary: Status of update request

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Utilities.RandomGenerator
files.Summary: Helper class for generating random numbers

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Utilities.Tools
files.Summary: Set of common utilities used by various plugins Currently the class mostly focuses on image-related functions that will be passed to the StreamDeck key

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Utilities.TracingLevel
files.Summary: Tracing levels used for Logger

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Wrappers.TitleHorizontalAlignment
files.Summary: Enum for the alignment of the Title text on the key

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Wrappers.TitleParameters
files.Summary: Class holding all the Title Information set by a user in the Property Inspector

files.Title: Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Wrappers.TitleVerticalAlignment
files.Summary: Enum for the alignment of the Title text on the key
